```{r}
library(ggplot2)

nfossils <- c()

nextant <- c()

info <- c()

no_fossil_mean <- c()

fossil_mean <- c()

true_heights <- c()

partial_fossil_percentage <-

partial_fossil_info <- 

partial_fossil_mean <-

accuracy_fossils <- fossil_mean - true_heights
accuracy_no_fossils <- no_fossil_mean - true_heights

data <- data.frame(nfossils, nextant, info, fossil_mean, no_fossil_mean, true_heights)

ggplot(data = data, aes(x = nfossils, y = info)) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  stat_cor(aes(label = ..rr.label..), label.x = 1, label.y = 20) +
   stat_regline_equation(label.x = 10, label.y = 20)

ggplot(data = data, aes(x = fossil_mean, y = info)) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  stat_cor(aes(label = ..rr.label..), label.x = 2, label.y = 20) +
   stat_regline_equation(label.x = 2, label.y = 2)

ggplot(data = data, aes(x = nfossils, y = accuracy_fossils)) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  stat_cor(aes(label = ..rr.label..), label.x = 2, label.y = 20) +
   stat_regline_equation(label.x = 2, label.y = 2)

mean(fossil_mean - true_heights)
mean(no_fossil_mean - true_heights)

ggplot(data = data, aes(x = fossil_mean, y = no_fossil_mean)) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  stat_cor(aes(label = ..rr.label..), label.x = 2, label.y = 20) +
   stat_regline_equation(label.x = 2, label.y = 2)

# Flatten into a data frame
df <- data.frame(
  partial_fossil_percentage = unlist(partial_fossil_percentage),
  partial_fossil_info = unlist(partial_fossil_info),
  partial_fossil_mean = unlist(partial_fossil_mean),
  # Create a group ID based on which sub-vector the data came from
  group = rep(seq_along(partial_fossil_percentage), sapply(partial_fossil_info, length))
)

ggplot(data=df, aes(x = partial_fossil_percentage, y = partial_fossil_info, color = factor(group))) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  xlab("percentage of fossils included in analysis") +
  ylab("information content")

ggplot(data=df, aes(x = partial_fossil_percentage, y = partial_fossil_mean, color = factor(group))) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  xlab("percentage of fossils included in analysis") +
  ylab("mean")

# get accuracy of each partial fossil rep
partial_fossil_accuracy <- lapply(seq_along(partial_fossil_mean), function(i) {
  true_heights[i] - partial_fossil_mean[[i]]
})

# Flatten into a data frame
df <- data.frame(
  partial_fossil_percentage = unlist(partial_fossil_percentage),
  partial_fossil_info = unlist(partial_fossil_info),
  partial_fossil_accuracy = unlist(partial_fossil_accuracy),
  # Create a group ID based on which sub-vector the data came from
  group = rep(seq_along(partial_fossil_percentage), sapply(partial_fossil_info, length))
)

ggplot(data=df, aes(x = partial_fossil_percentage, y = partial_fossil_accuracy, color = factor(group))) +
  geom_point(size=5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  xlab("percentage of fossils included in analysis") +
  ylab("distance from truth")
```
